body: Closed children: capability seal axon-gap-closure-70f7bda7 (implementation c44cd3af, closure f760b81e); governed handler APIs axon-gap-closure-65ca707f (implementation 05a507ce, closure 782b7ac9); governed DDx bead lifecycle axon-gap-closure-f73cd3d2 (repaired implementation 5383df7b, closure f15c3d42); memory/SQLite/PostgreSQL 16 parity axon-gap-closure-94348231 (implementation/report fa18a621, closure fd2d49b6). Final parity: 7 named vectors x 3 backends = 21 cases, no ignored; full serial workspace PostgreSQL, compile-fail, clippy, and fmt gates pass.
summary: All four governed system lifecycle children closed with structured review and backend parity evidence
